overview.description: The iShares JP Morgan USD Emerging Markets Bond ETF (EMB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the J.P. Morgan EMBI Global Core index. The fund tracks an index of US-dollar-denominated sovereign debt issued by emerging-market countries with more than $1B outstanding and at least two years remaining in maturity. EMB was launched on Dec 17, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: J.P. Morgan EMBI Global Core Index

data.title: European bond sell-off gathers pace
data.text: Fixed income continues to sell off across Europe which focuses investors' minds on UK April inflation. Crude prices slip on news that several tankers were able to exit the Strait of Hormuz.

data.text: Key emerging markets like Brazil and Mexico have been ahead of the U.S. Federal Reserve in hiking rates to fight inflation, setting the stage for a loosening cycle that could boost bond values.
